headline: Tech leads (+74) as post-correction AI base rebuilds; Energy collapses (−58) as Iran ceasefire + OPEC+ hike flood oil market; FOMC July 29 and June CPI (~Jul 15) are the twin override risks.
Financials lead into July 14 bank earnings; Energy rolls over on Iran peace deal normalizing oil supply; June NFP is the morning wildcard.
Health Care hits 52-wk highs on defensive rotation; XLC near 52-wk lows; June Jobs report is the week's market-mover.
Semis & Tech lead on AI supercycle intact; Gold Miners in freefall on hawkish Fed; NFP Thursday & Iran Doha talks are the week's market-moving wildcards.

Healthcare (XLV) hits 52-week high on defensive rotation while semis (SMH) break down and energy (XLE) bleeds as Iran oil license deflates the war premium — June 30 Doha talks and July 2 jobs report are the binary events that reset the tape.
